Class Faculty

java.lang.Object
schoolrecords.Person
schoolrecords.Employee
schoolrecords.Faculty
public class Faculty extends Employee
Represents a faculty member, which is a type of Employee. Extends the Employee class and adds faculty-specific information.

  • Constructor Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • Faculty

      public Faculty()
      Default constructor for Faculty.

    • Faculty

      public Faculty(String name, String address, String phoneNumber, String emailAddress, String office, double salary, String dateHired, String officeHours, String rank)
      Constructor with all parameters.
      Parameters:
      name - the faculty member's name
      address - the faculty member's address
      phoneNumber - the faculty member's phone number
      emailAddress - the faculty member's email address
      office - the faculty member's office location
      salary - the faculty member's salary
      dateHired - the date the faculty member was hired
      officeHours - the faculty member's office hours
      rank - the faculty member's rank (junior or senior)

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the Faculty object.
      Overrides:
